name: Prefrontal — Calendar Sync (3 ICS feeds: personal + work + Outlook)

nodes.name: Get Personal ICS
nodes.notes: Google Calendar → Settings → your calendar → 'Secret address in iCal format'. NOTE: Google caches this; new events can lag a few hours.

nodes.name: Get Work ICS
nodes.notes: Paste your work calendar's shared/secret iCal feed URL (read-only).

nodes.name: Get Outlook ICS
nodes.notes: Outlook/M365 → Settings → Calendar → Shared calendars → Publish a calendar → copy the ICS link.

nodes.name: POST /webhooks/calendar/sync
nodes.notes: 127.0.0.1 (NOT localhost): Node resolves localhost to ::1, Prefrontal binds IPv4 only.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "token": "PUSHOVER_TOKEN",
  "user": "PUSHOVER_USER",
  "title": "Prefrontal — double-booking",
  "message": "⚠️ {{ $json.conflicts }} overlapping commitment(s) on your calendar. Check /commitments/conflicts.",
  "priority": 1
}
